---
title: ""
---

# CONTACT US

We would be happy to hear from you regarding appointments, services, collaboration, or general questions. 

---

<div class="card">

## GENERAL CONTACT

**Email:**  
<a href="mailto:telespeaknepal@gmail.com">telespeaknepal@gmail.com</a>  

<br>

**Phone:**  
+977-XXXXXXXXXX  

<br>

**Service Mode:**  
Online consultation  

</div>

---


<div class="card">

## RESEARCH & CLINICAL COLLABORATION

See research work from our team here:

<a href="https://nccsnepal.org/" target="_blank">Nepal Center for Cognition and Society (NCCS)</a>

We welcome collaboration with professionals and organizations working in communication sciences, healthcare, research and public health.

</div>

---

<div class="card">

## FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIAS FOR MORE INFORMATION


<a href="#" target="_blank">Facebook</a><br>
<a href="#" target="_blank">Instagram</a><br>
<a href="#" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a><br>
<a href="#" target="_blank">TikTok</a>

</div>
